title: Tisza Performance by Constituency Type
description: H1: Tisza won supermajority by breaking into rural constituencies Fidesz gerrymandered for itself

data.label: Vidéki kerületek (~51 kerület)
data.note: Tisza won majority of rural districts — the key to supermajority

key_finding: Tisza won 64 of 76 rural/city constituencies (84%), including many that Fidesz held with large margins in 2022. Without these rural wins, Tisza would have had only ~29 urban seats — far from supermajority. Rural penetration was THE decisive factor.
